title: RedisResourceComponent

resource_key.description: The key under which the Redis resource is registered.

password_env_var.description: Name of the environment variable holding the Redis password.

ssl.description: Whether to use SSL/TLS for the connection.

url_env_var.description: Name of the environment variable holding a full Redis URL (overrides host/port/db).

description: Register a Redis resource for in-memory key-value store and pub/sub access
